kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC-001 - Login As Admin Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value admin.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Url Contains
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
รอจนกว่า URL จะมี string ที่กำหนด

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TC-001 PASSED: Admin login redirect to admin_home.php
kw.arg: TC-001 PASSED: Admin login redirect to admin_home.php
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: TS-001: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยตัวผู้ดูแลระบบ

test.name: TC-002 - Login As Student Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Url Contains
kw.doc: รอจนกว่า URL จะมี string ที่กำหนด

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TC-002 PASSED: Student login redirect to student_home.php
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: TS-002: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยตัวนักศึกษา

test.name: TC-003 - Login As In-Personnel Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Url Contains
kw.doc: รอจนกว่า URL จะมี string ที่กำหนด

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TC-003 PASSED: In-Personnel login redirect to in_personnel_home.php
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: TS-003: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยตัวบุคลากรภายใน

test.name: TC-004 - Login As Out-Personnel Successfully

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a141d6d5+14ef5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a141d740+14f60] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a116d386] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11b8683] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11ef672] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11e948f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11e8c53] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a1136325] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a171b779+312f99] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1715c8b+30d4ab] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1739012+330832] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a143a485+31ca5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1442e7c+3a69c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11350bc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a186f9d8+4671f8] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffdbf89259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffdc140af78+28]

test.doc: TS-005: กรอก Password ไม่ถูกต้อง → แสดง "Wrong email or password or role"

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a141d6d5+14ef5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a141d740+14f60] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a116d386] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11b8683] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11ef672] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11e948f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11e8c53] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a1136325] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a171b779+312f99] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1715c8b+30d4ab] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1739012+330832] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a143a485+31ca5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a1442e7c+3a69c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6a11350bc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6a186f9d8+4671f8] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffdbf89259d+1d] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffdc140af78+28]
